docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY AUTORETURN AS TO DEFENDANT LILAGAN, MICHAEL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-16-2018 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-16-2018 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - (FEE FOR SERVICE: $105.00)) SERVED APR-10-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT LILAGAN, MICHAEL

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-16-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-16-2018 BY PRO TEM DAVID FLEISIG. PLAINTIFF AUTORETURN IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY DAN SCANLAN, VP OF TOWING. DEFENDANT MICHAEL LILAGAN IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID FLEISIG; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AUTORETURN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LILAGAN, MICHAEL $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $155.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,655.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF AUTORETURN
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM COMMISSIONER FILED BY AUTORETURN LILAGAN, MICHAEL
